scenes.title: Bude shafin token daga Hanji
scenes.caption: A cikin Hanji, danna “Bude shafin token na Notion” don bude tashar mai haɓaka Notion a cikin sabon shafi.

scenes.title: Zaɓi workspace, ƙirƙiri token
scenes.caption: Zaɓi “Token shiga”, sannan zaɓi wane workspace na Notion wannan token ya shafi — token koyaushe yana cikin workspace ɗaya kawai.

scenes.title: Kwafa token shiga
scenes.caption: Kwafa token ntn_… kuma liƙa shi cikin filin token da ke ƙasa.

scenes.title: Haɗa shi zuwa shafukanka
scenes.caption: A cikin Notion, bude kowane shafi na sama → ··· → Haɗi → ƙara wannan haɗi. Shafukan ƙasa sun haɗa ta atomatik — sannan ka dawo ka duba.

scenes.title: Liƙa token a cikin Hanji
scenes.caption: Komawa cikin Hanji, liƙa token ɗin da ka kwafa a cikin filin “Token API na Notion”.

scenes.title: Zaɓi abin da za ka shigo da shi
scenes.caption: Shigo da workspace ɗin gaba ɗaya, ko zaɓi “Shafuka na musamman” don kawo kawai shafuka da databases da ka zaɓa.

mock.inkIntroTitle: Shigo da token API ta Notion
mock.inkIntroDesc: Don karɓar bakuncin gida, liƙa token da kuka ƙirƙira a Notion shine mafi ingantaccen saiti.
mock.inkStep2Title: Zaɓi abin da za a shigo da shi
mock.scopeAllDesc: Duk abin da haɗin zai iya samun dama. Alakar database tsakanin shafuka tana nan tsaye.
mock.scopeSomeDesc: Duba manyan abubuwan da ake iya samun dama, sannan shigo da shafuka da databases ɗin da ka zaɓa kawai.
mock.listSubtitle: Ƙirƙiri da sarrafa haɗin API na Notion na jama'a da na sirri
mock.colWorkspaces: Wuraren aiki da za a iya shigarwa:
mock.capabilities: Karanta abun ciki, sabunta da shigar da abun ciki, da karanta bayanan mai amfani
mock.modalDesc: Ƙirƙiri haɗi don tabbatar da apps, agents, da workflows tare da Notion. Zaɓi iyakar workspace ɗaya ko workspace da yawa.
mock.accessTokenDesc: Token API mai tsayi, mai iyaka da wurin aiki, wanda ake rabawa tsakanin masu haɗin gwiwa, tare da saitunan iyawa na kansa. An iyakance shi ga wurin aiki 1 kuma ba za a iya jera shi a Kasuwa ba.
mock.oauthDesc: OAuth 2.0 na mai amfani; izini ya iyakance ga mai amfani da ya shiga. Yana tallafawa workspaces da yawa.
mock.wsLabel: Wuraren aikin da za a iya shigar:
mock.wsDesc: Wannan token ya shafi workspace ɗin da aka zaɓa.
mock.terms: Ta ƙirƙirar haɗi, kun yarda da sharuɗɗan mai haɓaka na Notion.
mock.tokenSectionDesc: Yi amfani da wannan token don tantance buƙatun API na wannan workspace. Duk wanda ke da token zai iya aiki a madadin haɗin, don haka kiyaye shi a ɓoye.
